description:
About the job
Lead. Transform. Innovate. Build the Next Generation of RegTech.

Our client, a leading SaaS RegTech provider, is looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join their growing team. They are tackling one of the most complex challenges in modern digital systems, enabling the secure sharing and analysis of sensitive data at scale, in environments where trust, performance, and reliability are non-negotiable.

Operating at the intersection of RegTech and responsible gaming, their platform combines privacy-first design, advanced encryption, and a highly scalable architecture built to handle extreme demand. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams across product, design, operations, and compliance to deliver high-impact projects, shape platform evolution, and help define technical standards for enterprise clients.

About the Role

As a Software Engineer, you’ll play a hands-on role in designing, building, and evolving the core platform. You’ll work across the stack, contributing to technical decisions and seeing your work deployed into production.

What You’ll Be Doing:

Designing and building scalable software across front-end, back-end, and integration layers
Developing robust services and APIs that operate reliably at scale
Collaborating on system design and architecture with product and engineering peers
Writing clean, well-tested, production-grade code
Participating in agile delivery, planning, reviews, and continuous improvement
Supporting deployments and improving system reliability over time

About You

You are an experienced full-stack engineer who enjoys solving complex, real-world problems. You bring strong communication skills, a collaborative mindset, and a sense of ownership.

You will also have:

Proven experience delivering scalable, cloud-based systems
Comfort working across multiple parts of the stack as priorities evolve
Exposure to regulated, enterprise, or high-reliability environments (nice to have)
Strong understanding of modern development frameworks across front-end, back-end, and integrations
Hands on experience developing full-stack, cloud-native applications with Java (Spring Boot), Python, Node.js, React, TypeScript, integrating AWS services including AWS Connect, and leveraging Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, and DynamoDB for scalable, reliable platforms.
Familiarity with agile methodologies, CI/CD pipelines, and version control
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently and collaboratively

Why This Role?

Build technology with a genuine social and regulatory impact
Work on systems designed for scale, performance, and resilience
Be part of a smart, collaborative engineering team that values quality and ownership
Grow your skills across a modern, cloud-native stack
Influence how the platform evolves as the company scales

If you’re ready to innovate, and shape the future of SaaS RegTech, apply now.
